positive: A stylized, clean silhouette illustration of a wise owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by blooming celestial flora. The style should be minimalist, modern graphic art with strong black lines and limited palette accents of deep indigo, gold foil, and sage green. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, with the owl facing forward. Use negative space to define shapes, creating a sophisticated, occult aesthetic suitable for apparel. Full body shot of the owl and moon, high contrast, vibrant, mystical, tattoo art style, highly detailed, vector graphics, clean lines, intricate linework.
